div.p: If the JE_COMMIT record (Offset +0x80) is successfully written to the JournalRegion block (verified by CRC32) before SIGKILL, the recovery agent MUST replay all preceding logged operations within that SEQ_ID.

apply_entry implementations utilize bit_set and dir_insert_if_not_exists. In the event of a secondary crash during the recovery phase, subsequent replay attempts will result in a consistent state without block leakage or duplicate directory entries.

g.text: PID: 8922 assigned to child process (Namespace: PID, MNT)
Stable Storage Write: CRC32 valid | I/O Barrier Passed
Jitter injection: simulate race condition in flush window
